summary: Iteration 29: Tested Hero Image Upload in CMS and Admin Theme Customization features. All backend APIs working correctly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: CMS Generale tab shows 'Copertina Hero' section with image preview, upload button, Slogan Hero input, and Descrizione Hero textarea. Settings page shows 'Aspetto Gestionale' section with 6 presets (Rosa Classico, Blu Elegante, Verde Natura, Viola Lusso, Grigio Moderno, Scuro), 4 color pickers, 2 font selectors, and Save/Reset buttons. Theme changes persist and sidebar reflects new colors via localStorage polling.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - React hydration warning from dev tools, not affecting functionality
Some gallery images return 404 (WhatsApp Image files) - not related to hero/theme features

critical_code_review_comments: Hero image upload in CMS correctly implemented with preview, upload button, and text fields
Admin theme customization has all 6 presets as specified: Rosa Classico, Blu Elegante, Verde Natura, Viola Lusso, Grigio Moderno, Scuro
Theme persistence works via PUT /api/settings/admin-theme endpoint
Live preview updates sidebar in real-time via localStorage polling (200ms interval in Layout.jsx)
Public website hero section correctly renders with or without hero_image
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Temporarily changed admin theme to Blu Elegante for testing, then reset to Rosa Classico default
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified Hero Image Upload and Admin Theme Customization features. CMS at /gestione-sito has 'Copertina Hero' section in Generale tab with image preview, upload button (data-testid='hero-image-upload-btn'), Slogan Hero input (data-testid='config-hero-slogan'), and Descrizione Hero textarea. Settings at /settings has 'Aspetto Gestionale' section with 6 presets, 4 color pickers, 2 font selectors, Save/Reset buttons. Theme changes persist to database and sidebar updates via localStorage polling. Public website at /sito renders hero section with or without hero_image.

elements.preview: Shows hero image or dark background with salon name overlay
